mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPlanApplcntDao.selectOne */ select bsns_plan_applcnt_id ,bsns_plan_doc_id ,applcnt_nm ,gender_cd ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,native ,enc_email ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from uspt_bsns_plan_applcnt where 1=1 and bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId}
